Subject: New charges against Alec Baldwin in fatal "Rust" shooting

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<td id="Card14589253" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href14589253" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADHGYHKBBOKHAPSQ2LCABJN4RITOSPCENQLCIQMRBLSXIOP636QSQGVSKPMW72QTX7UIVFFOWXFDDZNH32NNYNOWDJ6JE7ZUM7SYC6EHZFNDLMVQTLAWTOWOQ2GRCHCXEYYGOQUUE5P55F5X6I6PR5756KNQEUNJ7AASR4QK4ABYSOYDGINEV&" target="_blank">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title14589253" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href14589253" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADB4MROQ7M2KSAATSDUVH524GUZHUV4GL26AAXG4B52LOMG57SDBQARB7VGSJ2FRHVAMVMOXZZOGPZXEIMD3QNCDOQ37QB7BB5CS5JS2F7OVFKNWPAVKVIKTAUZWJKWAEA2USXF3XOVGFSLAGJ64L6AHP52XBOZFZ3BWRCD4NJAD2CQLNBA6H&" target="_blank">
                        Shawn Barber, Olympian and world champion athlete who came out as…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName14589253" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">

                            </tr>

                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

    <tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
